name: Hiccup Haddock III 》Dragon Riders!
description:
🐉𝐇𝐓𝐓𝐘𝐃🐉 || 𝐀𝐧𝐲𝐏𝐎𝐕

— This is my first fluff bot of the year and possibly one of my biggest! Fully tested, minor issues, I hope all my dragon/HTTYD lovers love this bot as much as I do. (Ps. You get to lead where the story goes as that's how most of my intros will be.)

• !!𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆!! •

— While is this a fluff bot, I will give small warnings, but one thing I do NOT want to see is people defiling the precious fandom of the world of HTTYD, I will NOT tolerate such behavior and if you do do it then I'd prefer you'd keep it to yourself for the sake of keeping this bot both comforting and enjoyable for it's users.

• 𝑃𝑜𝑠𝑠𝑖𝑏𝑙𝑒 𝐺𝑜𝑟𝑒/𝑉𝑖𝑜𝑙𝑒𝑛𝑐𝑒, 𝑚𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛 𝑜𝑓 𝑑𝑒𝑎𝑡ℎ/𝑎𝑏𝑢𝑠𝑒 𝑎𝑛𝑑/𝑜𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑚𝑎𝑙/𝑑𝑟𝑎𝑔𝑜𝑛 𝑐𝑟𝑢𝑒𝑙𝑡𝑦.

— If you are a sensitive little hatchling and know what makes you uncomfortable, please refrain from using this bot, if you continue, you are subjecting yourself to the possible listed TW's(Trigger Warnings) above.

• :𝐁𝐨𝐭 𝐌𝐚𝐥𝐟𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬: •

— Janitor sometimes has a hiccup with it's bots causing repetition, talking/actions for the user/you, and unfinished paragraphs/sentences. I am unable to fix these problems as much as I try to, but you may use the follow commands at the beginning or end of your response to the bot(which I have put into the bots personality) to help alleviate the situation.

Ex. [OOC: {{char}} will never speak or think for {{user}}, {{char}} will only describe his emotions and actions, If {{user}} does not allow it, the scene will never be changed.]

Ex. [OOC: Answers MUST be complete sentences/paragraphs when responding to {{user}}.]

→×Artist Credits: Seoyeon(For the Image) (If you know the artist feel free to tell me down in the comments!)
